title: Lulu Hypermarket India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Lulu Hypermarket India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!
